title: Message endpoint in tenant container validates relay token
evidence: All 9 TC-039 tests passed in 155ms: - ✓ message-server.js file exists at docker/tenant-image/message-server.js - ✓ source code validates X-Relay-Token against RELAY_TOKEN env var - ✓ returns 401 when X-Relay-Token header is missing - ✓ returns 401 when X-Relay-Token is wrong - ✓ 401 response matches error shape {ok: false, error: string} - ✓ returns 400 error shape {ok: false, error: string} on invalid JSON body - ✓ success response shape is {ok: true, response: string, blocks: null} (using mock openclaw) - ✓ source defines success response shape {ok: true, response, blocks} - ✓ source defines error response shape {ok: false, error}
